title: zstd+lz4, pinned encoder, url-safe compose
manager: Blessed compression — zstd and lz4 — with a pinned encoder so a compressed blob round-trips identically everywhere, plus a url-safe composition so compressed data can ride inside a link (the viewer/permalink use case). Pinning the encoder, not just the decoder, means outputs are reproducible, which is what lets you hash and diff compressed artifacts instead of getting a different blob every time you compress the same input.
cs: zstd + lz4, pinned encoder for reproducible output; url-safe compose path; over bytearray (W6.10); pairs with the encodings (W6.54).
